title: Compute and Royalty Integration
description: A schema for connecting carrier-swarm inference traces with compute cost records, optional energy cost records, contribution weights, reward allocation readiness, and royalty hooks.

integration_id.description: A unique identifier for the compute and royalty integration record.

version.description: Version identifier for this integration record.

description.description: Human-readable description of the compute and royalty integration.

mission_reference.description: Reference to the related Carrier Swarm Mission.

mission_id.description: Identifier of the related carrier-swarm mission.

mission_schema.description: Schema used by the referenced mission.

mission_status.description: Current status of the referenced mission.

trace_reference.description: Reference to the related trace receipt integration record.

trace_integration_id.description: Identifier of the related trace receipt integration record.

trace_schema.description: Schema used by the referenced trace integration.

trace_complete.description: Whether the trace record is complete enough to support compute or royalty allocation.

external_trace_reference_id.description: Optional external trace receipt or audit record identifier.

compute_records.description: Compute and optional energy cost records for carrier, wing, trace, or human participants.

node_id.description: Identifier of the node or actor.

role.description: Role of the node or actor in the mission.

compute_unit.description: Unit used to describe compute usage.

compute_cost.description: Numeric compute cost value in the selected compute unit.

monetary_cost_estimate.description: Optional monetary cost estimate for this node contribution.

cost_estimation_method.description: Method used to measure or estimate cost.

contribution_allocation.description: Contribution weighting and allocation readiness for the mission.

allocation_method.description: Method used to assign contribution weights.

total_contribution_weight.description: Total contribution weight across all participants.

reward_eligible.description: Whether this participant is eligible for reward allocation.

royalty_hooks.description: Royalty or reward allocation hooks for downstream systems.

hook_id.description: Unique identifier for the royalty or reward hook.

allocation_reference_id.description: Optional reference to an allocation, royalty, or audit record.

human_review_required.description: Whether human review is required before this hook is used.

allocation_boundary.description: Boundary conditions for compute and royalty integration.

allocation_ready.description: Whether the record is ready for downstream allocation.

requires_human_review.description: Whether human review is required before allocation.

allows_automatic_distribution.description: Whether automatic reward or royalty distribution is allowed.

audit_required.description: Whether audit is required before finalization.

boundary_note.description: Optional note describing allocation limits or governance conditions.
